summary: Iteration 136 - Billing Page API Fix Verification. Bug fix verified: paymentAPI endpoints in api.js changed from /api/payments/* to /api/cashfree/*. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tests passed. Billing page loads consistently with all 7 products (4 subscriptions + 3 credit packs). No intermittent failures detected in 5 consecutive page loads.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: paymentAPI.getProducts() now calls /api/cashfree/products instead of /api/payments/products

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All products displayed, all buttons functional, 5/5 page loads successful

context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing page fix verified. The issue was frontend calling /api/payments/* endpoints that didn't exist. Fix changed paymentAPI in api.js to use /api/cashfree/* endpoints. All 7 products load correctly: 4 subscription plans (Weekly ₹199, Monthly ₹699, Quarterly ₹1999, Yearly ₹5999) and 3 credit packs (Starter ₹499, Creator ₹999, Pro ₹2499). Credits balance displays in header (910 Credits for test user). No console errors related to billing/payments.

bug_fix_verified.root_cause: Frontend api.js paymentAPI object was using /api/payments/* endpoints but backend only has /api/cashfree/* routes
